title: Daring Way
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Daring Way''' was a darkened street located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Its intersection of [[Vos Gesal Street/Legends|Vos Gesal Street]] in upper [[Uscru Entertainment District/Legends|Uscru Entertainment District]] was considered to have one of the highest-crime rates on Coruscant during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="loe">''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]''
